archimate:DataObject.name: Master Data
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: Master Data ABB is a Data Object that enables the implementation of non-transactional information to play a key role in the core operation of a business in public administrations and re-used for multiple purposes
Source: European Medicines Agency
Source reference: https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/glossary/master-data#:~:text=Master%20data%20Any%20non-transactional%20information%20considered%20to%20play,product%2C%20organisation%20and%20referential%20%28SPOR%29%20master%20data%20%27.
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): EU-ERS: Master Data Register. https://circabc.europa.eu/ui/group/3cc8c417-0f2a-4eb4-8ff7-10d60638446a/information
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Semantic view
Interoperability Saliency: The Master Data ABB is a key interoperable enabler for semantic interoperability because it is a core element for digital public services enabling the reuse of relevant data such as identifiers for parties, or locations.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/MasterDataDataObject
ABB name: eira:MasterDataDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/MasterDataDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic

properties.value: Master Data ABB is a Data Object that enables the implementation of non-transactional information to play a key role in the core operation of a business in public administrations and re-used for multiple purposes

The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): EU-ERS: Master Data Register. https://circabc.europa.eu/ui/group/3cc8c417-0f2a-4eb4-8ff7-10d60638446a/information

The Master Data ABB is a key interoperable enabler for semantic interoperability because it is a core element for digital public services enabling the reuse of relevant data such as identifiers for parties, or locations.
